
  // Type_msg
  public class Type_msg {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var type_struct : Vx_Core.Type_struct = Vx_Core.e_struct
    var p_code : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.e_string
    var p_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var p_detail : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var p_path : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.e_string
    var p_severity : Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    var p_text : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.e_string
  }
  // Generic_msg_any
  public class Generic_msg_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_msg = e_msg
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown() {
      v_msg_shutdown(self.backref)
    }
    // p_type_struct
    override public func p_type_struct() -> Vx_Core.Type_struct {
      return self.backref.type_struct
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_msg
    }
  }
  // Generic_msg_struct
  public class Generic_msg_struct : Vx_Core.Generic_struct {
    var backref : Type_msg = e_msg
  }
  // Generic_msg_type
  public class Generic_msg_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_msg = v_msg_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_msg = v_msg_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_msg = v_msg_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_msg = f_msg(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_msg_constructor
  public static func v_msg_constructor(
  ) -> Type_msg {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_msg()
  }
  // v_msg_create
  public static func v_msg_create(
  ) -> Type_msg {
    var output : Type_msg = v_msg_constructor()
    v_msg_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_msg_register
  public static func v_msg_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_msg_startup_type()
    v_msg_startup_empty()
    return t_msg
  }
  // v_msg_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_msg_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_msg
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_msg_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_struct = Vx_Core.e_struct
    let p_code : Vx_Core.Type_string = value.p_code
    let p_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.p_any
    let p_detail : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.p_detail
    let p_path : Vx_Core.Type_string = value.p_path
    let p_severity : Vx_Core.Type_int = value.p_severity
    let p_text : Vx_Core.Type_string = value.p_text
    value.p_code = Vx_Core.e_string
    value.p_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    value.p_detail = Vx_Core.e_any
    value.p_path = Vx_Core.e_string
    value.p_severity = Vx_Core.e_int
    value.p_text = Vx_Core.e_string
    Vx_Core.v_release_listany(
      [
        p_code.type_any,
        p_any.type_any,
        p_detail.type_any,
        p_path.type_any,
        p_severity.type_any,
        p_text.type_any
      ]
    )
  }
  // v_msg_startup - mutating
  public static func v_msg_startup(
    _ value : Type_msg
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_msg_any = Generic_msg_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_msg,
      generic_any
    )
    let generic_struct : Generic_msg_struct = Generic_msg_struct()
    value.type_struct = Vx_Core.v_struct_new_from_any_generic_struct(
      value.type_any,
      generic_struct
    )
  }
  // v_msg_startup_empty
  public static func v_msg_startup_empty() {
    v_msg_startup(e_msg)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_msg,
      e_msg.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_msg_startup_type
  public static func v_msg_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_msg
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/msg")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_struct
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_msg_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_msg
  public static func v_any_from_msg(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_msg
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_msg_from_any
  public static func v_msg_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msg {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_msg = Vx_Core.e_msg
    if let generic_any : Generic_msg_any = type_any.generic_any {
      output = generic_any.backref
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_msg_copy
  public static func v_msg_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_msg,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msg {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_msg = copyval
    Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    let orig_anymap : Vx_Core.Type_anymap = Vx_Core.v_anymap_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    let maptype : [String : Vx_Core.Type_type] = [
      "code" : Vx_Core.t_string,
      "any" : Vx_Core.t_any,
      "detail" : Vx_Core.t_any,
      "path" : Vx_Core.t_string,
      "severity" : Vx_Core.t_int,
      "text" : Vx_Core.t_string
    ]
    let merged_anymap : Vx_Core.Type_anymap = Vx_Core.v_anymap_from_maptype_anymap_anylist(
      maptype,
      orig_anymap,
      anylist
    )
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    if !ischanged {
      ischanged = Vx_Core.v_booleann_issame_from_anymap_anymap(
        orig_anymap,
        merged_anymap
      )
    }
    if ischanged {
      let type_delta : Vx_Core.Type_delta = Vx_Core.v_delta_from_any(
        merged_anymap.type_any
      )
      let p_code_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "code"
      )
      var p_code : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_string_from_any(
        p_code_any
      )
      var p_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "any"
      )
      var p_detail : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "detail"
      )
      let p_path_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "path"
      )
      var p_path : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_string_from_any(
        p_path_any
      )
      let p_severity_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "severity"
      )
      var p_severity : Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.v_int_from_any(
        p_severity_any
      )
      let p_text_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_anymap_keyn(
        merged_anymap,
        "text"
      )
      var p_text : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_string_from_any(
        p_text_any
      )
      output = v_msg_create()
      if p_code !== copyval.p_code {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_code.type_any)
        output.p_code = p_code
      }
      if p_any !== copyval.p_any {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_any.type_any)
        output.p_any = p_any
      }
      if p_detail !== copyval.p_detail {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_detail.type_any)
        output.p_detail = p_detail
      }
      if p_path !== copyval.p_path {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_path.type_any)
        output.p_path = p_path
      }
      if p_severity !== copyval.p_severity {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_severity.type_any)
        output.p_severity = p_severity
      }
      if p_text !== copyval.p_text {
        Vx_Core.v_reserve_any(p_text.type_any)
        output.p_text = p_text
      }
    }
    Vx_Core.v_release_except_listany(
      output.type_any,
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any,
        merged_anymap.type_any
      ]
    )
    return output
  }
  // f_msg
  public static func f_msg(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msg {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_msg = v_msg_copy(e_msg, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_msg : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_msg : Type_msg = v_msg_constructor()
